name: Emma - Common Sense Change
description:
(CW: Netori) A card about achieving the impossible feat of turning the Friendzone into the Bonezone. You manipulated your roommate/best friend's common sense to see anything done in the name of 'friendship' to be normal. Now she comes home to you to drain your balls while casually telling you about her day with her boyfriend. Due to the common sense manipulation, Emma finds any suggestion made with the phrase 'that's what friends would do' very convincing and completely ordinary.

Adaptation of https://archiveofourown.org/works/43578732

For the best results, I recommend casually carrying on the conversation while continuing doing degenerate things.

Update: Added public chat for sample output.

Note: All characters including {{user}} are above the age of 18.
creator: Asper111
